case_title: MARIA C HERRERA VS. LONG CHAN NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HERRERA, MARIA C AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LONG CHAN DBA LILY NAIL CARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY HERRERA, MARIA C NGUYEN, LONG CHAN DBA LILY NAIL CARE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH MEYERS. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MARIA C. HERRERA & DEFENDANT LONG CHAN NGUYEN, DBA LILY NAIL CARE. COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER QUY DAO ASSISTED MR. NGUYEN AT TODAY'S HEARING. KHANH HUYNH, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH MEYERS. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERRERA, MARIA C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LONG CHAN DBA LILY NAIL CARE $6,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED AUG-04-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LONG CHAN DBA LILY NAIL CARE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2016 - JUDGMENT.
